summary: Iteration 214 — Riesame Tecnico Selettivo Testing. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified — normative badges (EN 1090, EN 13241, Generica) display correctly, non-applicable checks are grayed out with strikethrough and (N/A) indicator, progress bar uses n_applicabili as denominator.

issues: Minor hydration warning in console about <tr> inside <span> - does not affect functionality (same as previous iterations)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: mixed_commessa=com_2c57c1283871 (EN_1090 + EN_13241 + GENERICA), generica_only=com_test_generica_only, en13241_only=com_test_en13241_only
context_for_next_testing_agent: Riesame Tecnico Selettivo feature fully tested. The CHECKS_DEFINITION in riesame_tecnico.py has 12 checks with normativa field (None=universal, ['EN_1090']=EN_1090 specific, ['EN_1090','EN_13241']=shared). The _filter_checks function returns all checks with 'applicabile' boolean. Frontend RiesameTecnicoSection correctly displays normative badges, grays out N/A checks with opacity-40 and line-through, shows (N/A) indicator, and uses n_applicabili for progress calculation.

backend_endpoints.description: Correctly skips validation for non-applicable checks
Generates valid PDF with normative info and N/A styling

features_verified: Normative badges (EN 1090, EN 13241, Generica) display in header
Progress bar shows 'X/Y superati (Z%)' where Y = n_applicabili (not n_totale)
N/A count indicator '(9 N/A)' displays in header for GENERICA-only
Non-applicable checks have opacity-40 class (grayed out)
Non-applicable checks show '(N/A)' indicator after label
Non-applicable checks show 'Non richiesto per GENERICA' as nota
Universal checks (disegni_validati, attrezzature_idonee, documenti_aziendali) are NOT grayed out
Minus icon used for N/A checks instead of CheckCircle/XCircle
